Metadata.title: Kairos Boilerplate
Metadata.description: Base template of the Activos Kairos Web Factory.

Home.title: Base template ready to ship
Home.subtitle: Next.js + TypeScript + Tailwind + shadcn/ui, multilingual and deployable on Render. Clone it, swap the brand tokens and publish.
Home.feature1Body: i18n routing with next-intl in the same repo.
Home.feature3Body: Render with per-branch previews and production on main.
